title: Premier League Trivia
description: From the 1992 inaugural season to today — how well do you know the EPL?

questions.prompt: Who is the Premier League's all-time top scorer?
questions.explanation: Alan Shearer scored 260 Premier League goals, mostly with Newcastle United.

questions.prompt: Which club won the inaugural Premier League title in the 1992–93 season?
questions.explanation: Manchester United, managed by Sir Alex Ferguson, won the first ever Premier League.

questions.prompt: Erling Haaland joined Manchester City in 2022 from which club?
questions.explanation: Haaland transferred from Borussia Dortmund and won the Golden Boot in his first PL season.

questions.prompt: Which stadium is home to Liverpool FC?
questions.explanation: Anfield has been Liverpool's home since 1892.

questions.prompt: Who has won the most Premier League Golden Boots?
choices: Both Henry and Shearer are tied
questions.explanation: Thierry Henry and Alan Shearer are tied on four Golden Boots each.
Salah captains the Egyptian national team.
Brighton & Hove Albion, named for their coastal home.

questions.prompt: Which player holds the record for most Premier League appearances?
questions.explanation: Gareth Barry made 653 PL appearances across Aston Villa, Manchester City, Everton, and West Brom.

questions.prompt: Which manager led Leicester City to their fairytale 2015–16 title?
questions.explanation: Claudio Ranieri's Leicester won the title at 5000-1 preseason odds.

questions.prompt: What is the largest stadium currently used in the Premier League by capacity?
Which club won four Premier League titles in a row from 2020–21 to 2023–24?
questions.explanation: Manchester City's four consecutive titles is a PL record.

questions.prompt: Newcastle United play their home games at:
questions.explanation: St James' Park has been Newcastle's home since 1892.

questions.prompt: Who is Arsenal's all-time leading goal scorer in the Premier League era?
questions.explanation: Thierry Henry is Arsenal's all-time top scorer with 228 goals across all competitions.

questions.prompt: In what year was the Premier League founded?
questions.explanation: The Premier League was founded in February 1992.

questions.prompt: Which goalkeeper has the most Premier League clean sheets all-time?
questions.explanation: Petr Čech finished his career with 202 PL clean sheets, a league record.
